basic_details.job_title: MFMS JMI Nursery Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Mushir Fatma Nursery School (MFMS JMI) Nursery Teacher Notification 2026 has been released on 27-05-2026 on the official website of Jamia Millia Islamia (JMI). A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the MFMS JMI Nursery Teacher Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma / certificate in Nursery Education / Training from a recognized institute OR a B.Ed (Nursery)
qualification.details: Senior secondary school certificate (or its equivalent) with at least 50% marks in aggregate from a recognized Board/university. Diploma/certificate in Nursery Education/Training from a recognized institute OR a B.Ed (Nursery). Must have the ability to read and write Urdu.

salary_details.pay_scale: Paid on a per period basis
salary_details.details: Paid on a per period basis

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MFMS JMI Nursery Teacher Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
